namu.개요: 1. 국민연금공단의 비공식 약칭2. 국제연합의 약칭 유엔3. 삼국지의 인물들3.1. 후한 말과 삼국시대 위나라의 관료 國淵3.2. 후한 말과 삼국시대의 반역자 麴演

Guo Yuan, styledZini, was fromGai[蓋],Le’an[樂安].
He treatedZheng Xuanas a teacher.ALater, he and others, includingBing YuanandGuan Ning, fled the chaos toLiaodong[遼東].B
TheSeparate Biography of[Zheng] Xuanstates:[Guo] Yuaninitially did not have a famed reputation.[Zheng] Xuanpraised him, saying, “GuoZiniis a magnificent talent! I have witnessed such a person who will certainly become a critical worker for the state!”
TheBook of WeibyWang Chenstates:[Guo] Yuanwas eager in studying and he was fond of the ancients. When he was inLiaodong[遼東], he would often teach on mountains and on cliffs. Many scholars respected and admired him. From this, he gained a famed reputation.
When he returned to his former lands, theGrand Progenitorrecruited him to serve asbureaucratic clerkunder theExcellency of Works. Each time he was in the government court for a discussion, he would always speak candidly and with a forthright expression. Whenever he withdrew, he was without any private ties.
